        MIN(START_TIME) AS trace_start_time, MAX(END_TIME) trace_end_time,
        ANY_VALUE(JSON_VALUE(ATTRIBUTES, '$."monocle_apptrace.version"')) AS trace_version,

        COUNTIF(LOWER(JSON_VALUE(ATTRIBUTES, '$."span.type"')) IN ('inference', 'inference.framework')) as inference_count,

qualified_traces AS
(
    SELECT trace_id AS fact_id, t1.NAME, t1.START_TIME, t1.END_TIME, t1.STATUS, t1.SPAN_ID, t1.TRACE_ID, t1.PARENT_ID, t1.ATTRIBUTES, t1.EVENTS, t1.INSERTION_TS,
        t2.*,
        CASE WHEN JSON_VALUE(ATTRIBUTES, '$."span.type"') = 'workflow'
            THEN
                CASE WHEN ARRAY_LENGTH(JSON_QUERY_ARRAY (t1.ATTRIBUTES, '$.entity')) > 0
                    THEN JSON_VALUE(JSON_QUERY_ARRAY (t1.ATTRIBUTES, '$.entity')[0], '$.name')
                    ELSE ""
                END
            ELSE
                JSON_VALUE(ATTRIBUTES, '$."workflow.name"')
        END AS WF_NAME,
        CASE WHEN JSON_VALUE(ATTRIBUTES, '$."span.type"') = 'workflow'
            THEN
                CASE WHEN t2.error_count > 0
                    THEN 'error'
                    ELSE 'success'
                END 
            ELSE
                CASE WHEN LOWER(JSON_EXTRACT_SCALAR(t1.STATUS, '$.code')) = 'error' THEN 'error' ELSE 'success' END
        END AS TRACE_STATUS,
        CASE WHEN LOWER(JSON_EXTRACT_SCALAR(t1.STATUS, '$.code')) = 'error'
        THEN
            JSON_EXTRACT_SCALAR(t1.STATUS, '$.message')
        END AS ERROR_MESSAGE,
        CASE WHEN JSON_VALUE(ATTRIBUTES, '$."span.type"') = 'workflow'
        THEN 
            CASE WHEN t2.genai_count > 0
                THEN 'genai'
                ELSE 'other'
            END 
        ELSE
            CASE WHEN (LOWER(JSON_VALUE(ATTRIBUTES, '$."span.type"')) IN ('inference', 'retrieval', 'inference.framework', 'agentic.invocation', 'agentic.tool.invocation', 'agentic.turn', 'agentic.mcp.invocation'))
                THEN 'genai' 
                ELSE 'other' 
            END
        END AS TRACE_TYPE,
        ROUND(TIMESTAMP_DIFF(END_TIME, START_TIME, MICROSECOND) / 1000) AS DURATION_MS,
        (TIMESTAMP_DIFF(END_TIME, START_TIME, MICROSECOND) / 1000) / 1000 <= 0.0 AS SLA_REALIZED,
        CASE WHEN t2.complete_count > 0 THEN FALSE ELSE TRUE END AS INCOMPLETE_TRACE,
        CASE WHEN LOWER(JSON_EXTRACT_SCALAR(t1.STATUS, '$.code')) = 'error' THEN
            CASE WHEN ARRAY_LENGTH(JSON_QUERY_ARRAY(t1.events, '$')) > 1
                THEN IFNULL(
                    JSON_VALUE(JSON_QUERY_ARRAY (t1.events, '$')[1], '$.attributes.error_code'),
                    IFNULL(
                        -- status_code is deprecated, fallback for backward compatibility
                        JSON_VALUE(JSON_QUERY_ARRAY (t1.events, '$')[1], '$.attributes.status_code'), 
                        'error'
                    )
                )
                ELSE 'error'
            END
            ELSE 'success'
        END AS ERROR_CODE,
        CASE WHEN JSON_VALUE(ATTRIBUTES, '$."span.type"') IN ('inference', 'inference.framework') THEN
            CASE WHEN ARRAY_LENGTH(JSON_QUERY_ARRAY(t1.events, '$')) > 2 THEN
                CASE WHEN JSON_VALUE(JSON_QUERY_ARRAY (t1.events, '$')[2], '$.name') = 'metadata' THEN
                    COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(JSON_QUERY_ARRAY (t1.events, '$')[2], '$.attributes.finish_type'), 'Unknown')
                ELSE
                    'Unknown'
                END
            ELSE
                'Unknown'
            END
        ELSE
            'Unknown'
        END AS FINISH_TYPE,
        CASE WHEN JSON_VALUE(ATTRIBUTES, '$."span.type"') IN ('inference', 'inference.framework') THEN
            CASE WHEN ARRAY_LENGTH(JSON_QUERY_ARRAY(t1.events, '$')) > 2 THEN
                CASE WHEN JSON_VALUE(JSON_QUERY_ARRAY (t1.events, '$')[2], '$.name') = 'metadata' THEN
                    COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(JSON_QUERY_ARRAY (t1.events, '$')[2], '$.attributes.sub_type'), 'Unknown')
                ELSE
                    'Unknown'
                END
            ELSE
                'Unknown'
            END
        ELSE
            'Unknown'
        END AS INFERENCE_SUB_TYPE,
        CASE WHEN JSON_VALUE(ATTRIBUTES, '$."span.type"') IN ('http.send', 'http.process') THEN
            CASE WHEN ARRAY_LENGTH(JSON_QUERY_ARRAY(ATTRIBUTES, '$.entity')) > 0
                THEN CONCAT(COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(JSON_QUERY_ARRAY (ATTRIBUTES, '$.entity')[0], '$.method'), ''), ' ', COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(JSON_QUERY_ARRAY (ATTRIBUTES, '$.entity')[0], '$.route'), ''))
                ELSE 'Unknown'
            END
        ELSE
            'Unknown'
        END AS ROUTE,
        CASE WHEN JSON_VALUE(ATTRIBUTES, '$."span.type"') IN ('agentic.delegation') THEN
            CASE WHEN ARRAY_LENGTH(JSON_QUERY_ARRAY(ATTRIBUTES, '$.entity')) > 0
                THEN COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(JSON_QUERY_ARRAY (ATTRIBUTES, '$.entity')[0], '$.to_agent'), 'Unknown')
                ELSE 'Unknown'
            END
        WHEN JSON_VALUE(ATTRIBUTES, '$."span.type"') IN ('agentic.invocation') THEN
            CASE WHEN ARRAY_LENGTH(JSON_QUERY_ARRAY(ATTRIBUTES, '$.entity')) > 0 AND JSON_VALUE(JSON_QUERY_ARRAY (ATTRIBUTES, '$.entity')[0], '$.from_agent') IS NOT NULL
                THEN COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(JSON_QUERY_ARRAY (ATTRIBUTES, '$.entity')[0], '$.name'), 'Unknown')
                ELSE 'Unknown'
            END
        ELSE
            'Unknown'
        END AS AGENT_DELEGATION,
        CASE WHEN JSON_VALUE(ATTRIBUTES, '$."span.type"') IN ('agentic.tool.invocation') THEN
            CASE WHEN ARRAY_LENGTH(JSON_QUERY_ARRAY(ATTRIBUTES, '$.entity')) > 0
                THEN COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(JSON_QUERY_ARRAY (ATTRIBUTES, '$.entity')[0], '$.name'), 'Unknown')
                ELSE 'Unknown'
            END
        ELSE
            'Unknown'
        END AS TOOL,
        CASE WHEN JSON_VALUE(ATTRIBUTES, '$."span.type"') IN ('agentic.mcp.invocation') THEN
            CASE WHEN ARRAY_LENGTH(JSON_QUERY_ARRAY(ATTRIBUTES, '$.entity')) > 0
                THEN COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(JSON_QUERY_ARRAY (ATTRIBUTES, '$.entity')[0], '$.name'), 'metadata_listing')
                ELSE 'Unknown'
            END
        ELSE
            'Unknown'
        END AS MCP_INVOCATION,
        CASE
            WHEN (((PARENT_ID = 'None' OR PARENT_ID IS NULL) AND JSON_VALUE(ATTRIBUTES, '$."span.type"') = 'workflow')) THEN 'traces'
            WHEN JSON_VALUE(ATTRIBUTES, '$."span.type"') IN ('inference', 'inference.framework') THEN 'inferences'
            WHEN JSON_VALUE(ATTRIBUTES, '$."span.type"') IN ('http.send', 'http.process') THEN 'http'
            WHEN JSON_VALUE(ATTRIBUTES, '$."span.type"') IN ('agentic.request', 'agentic.turn') THEN 'agent_requests'
            WHEN JSON_VALUE(ATTRIBUTES, '$."span.type"') IN ('agentic.invocation') THEN 'agent_operations'
            WHEN JSON_VALUE(ATTRIBUTES, '$."span.type"') IN ('agentic.delegation') THEN 'agent_delegation'
            WHEN JSON_VALUE(ATTRIBUTES, '$."span.type"') IN ('agentic.tool.invocation') THEN 'tool_operations'
            WHEN JSON_VALUE(ATTRIBUTES, '$."span.type"') IN ('agentic.mcp.invocation') THEN 'mcp_invocations'
            ELSE JSON_VALUE(ATTRIBUTES, '$."span.type"')
        END AS fact
    FROM `t_539bcf3ea3004fba88cb5966ec331369.traces` t1 JOIN timeboxed_traces t2 ON trace_id = t2.timebox_fact_id
    UNION ALL
    SELECT
        timebox_fact_id as fact_id, 'workflow' as name, trace_start_time as START_TIME, trace_end_time as END_TIME, JSON_OBJECT("code","unset","message", null) as STATUS,
        '1' as SPAN_ID, timebox_fact_id as TRACE_ID, 'None' as PARENT_ID,
        JSON_OBJECT('entity',JSON_ARRAY(STRUCT(trace_wf_name as name,'workflow.generic' as type)),
            'monocle_apptrace.version', trace_version ,'span.type','workflow') as ATTRIBUTES,
        JSON_ARRAY() AS EVENTS, CAST(NULL AS TIMESTAMP) AS insertion_ts, timeboxed_traces.*, trace_wf_name as WF_NAME,
        CASE WHEN error_count > 0
            THEN 'error'
            ELSE 'success'
        END AS TRACE_STATUS,
        CASE WHEN error_count > 0
            THEN 'bad error'
            ELSE ''
        END AS ERROR_MESSAGE,
        CASE WHEN genai_count > 0
            THEN 'genai'
            ELSE 'other'
        END AS TRACE_TYPE,
        ROUND(TIMESTAMP_DIFF(trace_end_time, trace_start_time, MICROSECOND) / 1000) AS DURATION_MS,
        (TIMESTAMP_DIFF(trace_end_time, trace_start_time, MICROSECOND) / 1000) / 1000 <= 0.0 AS SLA_REALIZED,
        TRUE AS INCOMPLETE_TRACE,
        CASE WHEN error_count > 0
            THEN 'error'
            ELSE 'success'
        END AS ERROR_CODE,
        'Unknown' AS FINISH_TYPE,
        'Unknown' AS INFERENCE_SUB_TYPE,
        'Unknown' AS ROUTE,
        'Unknown' AS TOOL,
        'Unknown' AS AGENT_DELEGATION,
        'Unknown' AS MCP_INVOCATION,
        'traces' AS fact
    FROM timeboxed_traces WHERE complete_count = 0
)
    SELECT 
        fact_id as id,
        MIN(START_TIME) AS start_time,
        MAX(END_TIME) AS end_time,
        ANY_VALUE(WF_NAME) AS workflow_name,
        ARRAY_AGG(
            CASE
            WHEN JSON_VALUE(event_item, '$.name') = 'data.input' THEN
                CASE
                    WHEN JSON_QUERY(event_item, '$.attributes.input') IS NOT NULL 
                        THEN TO_JSON_STRING(JSON_QUERY(event_item, '$.attributes.input'))
                    ELSE TO_JSON_STRING(JSON_VALUE(event_item, '$.attributes.input'))
                END
            ELSE
                CASE
                    WHEN JSON_QUERY(event_item, '$.attributes.response') IS NOT NULL 
                        THEN TO_JSON_STRING(JSON_QUERY(event_item, '$.attributes.response'))
                    ELSE TO_JSON_STRING(JSON_VALUE(event_item, '$.attributes.response'))
                END
            END IGNORE NULLS -- This ensures NULL attribute values are skipped
            ORDER BY
            JSON_VALUE(event_item, '$.timestamp')
        ) AS prompt_array 
    FROM qualified_traces, UNNEST(JSON_QUERY_ARRAY(events, '$')) AS event_item
    WHERE
        JSON_VALUE(attributes, '$."span.type"') in UNNEST(['inference', 'inference.framework'])
        AND JSON_VALUE(event_item, '$.name') IN ('data.input', 'data.output')
        AND  TRUE 
        
    GROUP BY fact_id]
